briefdescription.para: buffer for exceptions raised in threads
pointers to connection parameters specified as arrays
dictionaries to pass to connect function, one per thread for every syn_spec
indicate that weight and delay should not be set per synapse
indicate that weight should not be set per synapse
indicate that delay should not be set per synapse
all other parameters, mapping name to value representation
synapse-specific parameters that should be skipped when we set default synapse parameters
Connect with or without structural plasticity.
Delete synapses with or without structural plasticity.

memberdef.argsstring: (NodeCollectionPTR sources, NodeCollectionPTR targets, const DictionaryDatum &conn_spec, const std::vector< DictionaryDatum > &syn_specs)
memberdef.name: ConnBuilder

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t snode_id, size_t tnode_id, const size_t tid, int update)
memberdef.name: change_connected_synaptic_elements

briefdescription.para: Updates the number of connected synaptic elements in the target and the source.

parameterdescription.para: The node ID of the source
The node ID of the target
Amount of connected synaptic elements to update

simplesect.para: A bool indicating if the target node is on the local thread/process or not

briefdescription.para: Return true if rule is applicable only to nodes with proxies.
Implements the actual connection algorithm.

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t snode_id, Node &target, size_t target_thread, RngPtr rng, size_t indx)
memberdef.name: update_param_dict_

briefdescription.para: Create connection between given nodes, fill parameter values.
Moves pointer in parameter array.

detaileddescription.para: Calls value-function of all parameters being instantiations of ArrayDoubleParameter or ArrayIntegerParameter, thus moving the pointer to the next parameter value. The function is called when the target node is not located on the current thread or MPI-process and read of an array.

briefdescription.para: Returns true if conventional looping over targets is indicated.

detaileddescription.para:
Conventional looping over targets must be used if
any connection parameter requires skipping
targets are not given as a simple range (lookup otherwise too slow)

Conventional looping should be used if
the number of targets is smaller than the number of local nodes
For background, see Ippen et al (2017).

simplesect.para: true if conventional looping is to be used

briefdescription.para: Collects all array parameters in a vector.

detaileddescription.para: If the inserted parameter is an array it will be added to a vector of ConnParameters. This vector will be exploited in some connection routines to ensuring thread-safety.

briefdescription.para: Set synapse specific parameters.
Set structural plasticity parameters (if provided)

detaileddescription.para: This function first checks if any of the given syn_specs contains one of the structural plasticity parameters pre_synaptic_element or post_synaptic_element. If that is the case and only a single syn_spec is given, the parameters are copied to the variables pre_synaptic_element_name_ and post_synaptic_element_name_, and the flag use_structural_plasticity_ is set to true.

An exception is thrown if either
only one of the structural plasticity parameter is given
multiple syn_specs are given and structural plasticity parameters are present

briefdescription.para: Reset weight and delay pointers.
Abstract base class for ConnBuilders.

detaileddescription.para: The base class extracts and holds parameters and provides the connect interface. Derived classes implement the connect method.

simplesect.para: Naming classes *Builder to avoid name confusion with Connector classes.
